posts.title: Sctf 2018 Script-In-Script 源码
posts.text: 没啥值得提的,看一下源码大家就都明白了[逃] 第一层很简单, eval->console.log即可dump出前部源码 第二层其实是四则运算的位运算版,可以直接脚本爆破,也可以下个断点直接判断出每个函数的功能 P.S.:没有TS的日子无法想象啊~ calc. Negative(First: number): number { return Add(~First, 1);}function Add(First: number, Second: number): number { return Second ? Add(First ^ Second, (First & Second) << 1) : First;}function Minus(First: number, Second: number): number { return Add(First, Negative(Second));}function Multi(First: number, Second: number): number { let Result: number = 0; while (Second) { if (Second & 1) { Result = Add(Result, First); } First = First << 1; Second = Second >> 1; } return Result;}function Divide(First: number, Second: number): number { let Result: number = 0; while (First >= Second) { First = Minus(First, Second); Result = Add(Result, 1); } return Result;}function StrLen(_String: string): number { return _String.length;}function NumberIsSame(Number1: number, Number2: number): boolean { return !(Number1 ^ Number2);}function GetCharAt(_String: string, Index: number): string { return _String[Index];}function CharToNumber(Char: string): number { if (Char.length == 1) { return Char.charCodeAt(0); }}function StringToNumber(Char: string): number { return +Char;}function NumberToString(Num: number): string { return String(Num);}function StringAppend(String1: string, String2: string): string { return String1 + String2;}function StringAreaEq(Begin: number, End: number, Main: string, Match: string): boolean { for (var i: number = Begin; i <= End; i++) { if (Main[i] != Match[i - Begin]) { return false; } } return true;}let FLAG: string = "sctf{5cr1Pt_In_ScrIpT!!}";function CheckFlag(Flag: string): boolean { let LocalFlag: string = Flag; let FlagLength: number = StrLen(LocalFlag); let IsFlagLengthMatch: boolean = NumberIsSame(FlagLength, 24); console.log("IsFlagLengthMatch: " + IsFlagLengthMatch); let Char_s: string = GetCharAt(LocalFlag, 0); let Char_c_1: string = GetCharAt(LocalFlag, 1); let Char_t: string = GetCharAt(LocalFlag, 2); let Char_f: string = GetCharAt(LocalFlag, 3); let Number1 = Add(CharToNumber(Char_s), CharToNumber(Char_t)); let Number2 = Minus(CharToNumber(Char_s), CharToNumber(Char_c_1)); console.log("Number1: " + Number1); console.log("Number2: " + Number2); let Char_c_2: string = GetCharAt(LocalFlag, 6); let Char_r_1: string = GetCharAt(LocalFlag, 7); let Char_c_3: string = GetCharAt(LocalFlag, 16); let Char_r_2: string = GetCharAt(LocalFlag, 17); let IsC1EqC3: boolean = NumberIsSame(Minus(CharToNumber(Char_c_1), CharToNumber(Char_c_3)), 0); console.log("IsC1EqC3: " + IsC1EqC3); let Is6Add7Eq16Add17: boolean = NumberIsSame(Add(CharToNumber(Char_c_2), CharToNumber(Char_r_1)), Add(CharToNumber(Char_c_3), CharToNumber(Char_r_2))); console.log("Is6Add7Eq16Add17: " + Is6Add7Eq16Add17); let IsC1EqC2: boolean = NumberIsSame(Minus(CharToNumber(Char_c_1), CharToNumber(Char_c_2)), 0); console.log("IsC1EqC3: " + IsC1EqC3); let Char_21: string = GetCharAt(LocalFlag, 21); let Char_22: string = GetCharAt(LocalFlag, 22); let Is21Eq22: boolean = NumberIsSame(Minus(Multi(CharToNumber(Char_21), 2), Divide(66, CharToNumber(Char_22))), 64); console.log("Is21Eq22: " + Is21Eq22); let IsAreaMatch_1: boolean = StringAreaEq(9, 15, LocalFlag, "Pt_In_S"); console.log("IsAreaMatch_1: " + IsAreaMatch_1); let IsR1EqR: boolean = NumberIsSame(CharToNumber(Char_r_1), CharToNumber('r')); console.log("IsR1EqR: " + IsR1EqR); let InMum1Eq231: boolean = NumberIsSame(Number1, 231); let InMum2Eq16: boolean = NumberIsSame(Number2, 16); console.log("InMum1Eq236: " + InMum1Eq231); console.log("InMum2Eq16: " + InMum2Eq16); let Number_5: number = StringToNumber(GetCharAt(LocalFlag, 5)); console.log("Number_5: " + Number_5); let CharFMul10Div5Is204: boolean = NumberIsSame(Divide(StringToNumber(StringAppend(NumberToString(CharToNumber(Char_f)), "0")), Number_5), 204); console.log("CharFMul10Div5Is204: " + CharFMul10Div5Is204); let Number_1: number = StringToNumber(GetCharAt(LocalFlag, 8)); console.log("Number_1: " + Number_1); let IsAreaMatch_2: boolean = StringAreaEq(18, 20, LocalFlag, "IpT"); console.log("IsAreaMatch_2: " + IsAreaMatch_2); let Is5Sub1Eq4: boolean = NumberIsSame(Minus(Number_5, Number_1), 4); console.log("Is5Sub1Eq4: " + Is5Sub1Eq4); let Is1Mul1Eq1: boolean = NumberIsSame(Multi(Number_1, Number_1), Number_1); console.log("Is1Mul1Eq1: " + Is1Mul1Eq1); let WTF: boolean = NumberIsSame(Add(CharToNumber(GetCharAt(LocalFlag, 4)), Add(Number_1, Number_1)), CharToNumber(GetCharAt(LocalFlag, 23))); console.log("WTF: " + WTF); let IsC1Eq99: boolean = NumberIsSame(CharToNumber(Char_c_1), 99); console.log("IsC1Eq99: " + IsC1Eq99); let IsCh23Eq125: boolean = NumberIsSame(CharToNumber(GetCharAt(LocalFlag, 23)), 125); console.log("IsCh32Eq125: " + IsCh23Eq125); let IsCh22Eq33: boolean = NumberIsSame(CharToNumber(GetCharAt(LocalFlag, 22)), 33); console.log("IsCh22Eq21: " + IsCh22Eq33); return (IsFlagLengthMatch && IsC1EqC3 && Is6Add7Eq16Add17 && IsC1EqC2 && Is21Eq22 && IsAreaMatch_1 && IsR1EqR && InMum1Eq231 && InMum2Eq16 && CharFMul10Div5Is204 && IsAreaMatch_2 && Is5Sub1Eq4 && Is1Mul1Eq1 && WTF && IsC1Eq99 && IsCh23Eq125 && IsCh22Eq33);}console.log(CheckFlag(FLAG)); loader. GetUpperCaseTable() { return "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ"; }function GetLowerCaseTable() { return GetUpperCaseTable().toLowerCase(); }function GetNumberTable() { return "0123456789"; }function GetSpicialTable() { return "+/="; }interface Interpreter { InterpreterCode: string; InterpreterPassword: number; InterpreterIdentification: string;}class InterpreterMaker implements Interpreter { public InterpreterCode: string = ""; public InterpreterPassword: number = 0; public InterpreterIdentification: string = ""; constructor(public VMScript: string) { let InterpreterInfoStringList = VMScript.split("|"); if (InterpreterInfoStringList.length == 3) { this.InterpreterCode = InterpreterInfoStringList[0]; this.InterpreterPassword = +InterpreterInfoStringList[1]; this.InterpreterIdentification = InterpreterInfoStringList[2]; } }}class ScriptRuntime { static CallInnerFunction(FunctionName: string, Pars : string): string { return eval((FunctionName + "(\"" + Pars + "\")")); } static RegisterRuntimeFunction(InterpreterIdentification: string, InterpreterCode: string) { let _Function = "function "; let Brackets = ""; let LeftBrackets = ""; let RightBrackets = ""; let Semicolon = ""; let FinalCommand = _Function + InterpreterIdentification + Brackets + LeftBrackets + InterpreterCode + Semicolon + RightBrackets; this.EvalCode(FinalCommand); } static EvalCode(CodeToRun: string): string { let cover_eval = eval; return cover_eval(CodeToRun); }}class CB { private static _ShiftRight(Letter: string, NOfCaesarEncrypt: number) { var Ascii = Letter.charCodeAt(0); if (Ascii >= 65 && Ascii <= 90) { let FinalPos: number = (GetUpperCaseTable().indexOf(Letter) + NOfCaesarEncrypt) % GetUpperCaseTable().length; return GetUpperCaseTable().charAt(FinalPos); } else if (Ascii >= 97 && Ascii <= 122) { let FinalPos: number = (GetLowerCaseTable().indexOf(Letter) + NOfCaesarEncrypt) % GetLowerCaseTable().length; return GetLowerCaseTable().charAt(FinalPos); } else { return Letter; } } private static _ShiftLeft(Letter: string, NOfCaesarEncrypt: number) { var Ascii = Letter.charCodeAt(0); var LNOfCaesarEncrypt = NOfCaesarEncrypt % GetUpperCaseTable().length; if (Ascii >= 65 && Ascii <= 90) { let FinalPos: number = GetUpperCaseTable().indexOf(Letter); if (FinalPos - LNOfCaesarEncrypt < 0) { FinalPos = GetUpperCaseTable().length - (LNOfCaesarEncrypt - FinalPos); return GetUpperCaseTable().charAt(FinalPos); } else { return GetUpperCaseTable().charAt(FinalPos - LNOfCaesarEncrypt); } } else if (Ascii >= 97 && Ascii <= 122) { let FinalPos: number = GetLowerCaseTable().indexOf(Letter); if (FinalPos - LNOfCaesarEncrypt < 0) { FinalPos = GetLowerCaseTable().length - (LNOfCaesarEncrypt - FinalPos); return GetLowerCaseTable().charAt(FinalPos); } else { return GetLowerCaseTable().charAt(FinalPos - LNOfCaesarEncrypt); } } return Letter; } private static Shift(Letter: string, NOfCaesarEncrypt: number): string { if (NOfCaesarEncrypt < 0) { return CB._ShiftLeft(Letter, -NOfCaesarEncrypt); } else { return CB._ShiftRight(Letter, NOfCaesarEncrypt); } } private static Utf8Encode(StringToEncode: string): string { StringToEncode = StringToEncode.replace(/\r\n/g, "\n"); let EncodedText: string = ""; for (var n = 0; n < StringToEncode.length; n++) { var c = StringToEncode.charCodeAt(n); if (c < 128) { EncodedText += String.fromCharCode(c); } else if ((c > 127) && (c < 2048)) { EncodedText += String.fromCharCode((c >> 6) | 192); EncodedText += String.fromCharCode((c & 63) | 128); } else { EncodedText += String.fromCharCode((c >> 12) | 224); EncodedText += String.fromCharCode(((c >> 6) & 63) | 128); EncodedText += String.fromCharCode((c & 63) | 128); } } return EncodedText; } private static Utf8Decode(StringToDecode: string): string { var EncodedText = ""; let i: number = 0, c: number = 0, c1: number = 0, c2: number = 0; while (i < StringToDecode.length) { c = StringToDecode.charCodeAt(i); if (c < 128) { EncodedText += String.fromCharCode(c); i++; } else if ((c > 191) && (c < 224)) { c1 = StringToDecode.charCodeAt(i + 1); EncodedText += String.fromCharCode(((c & 31) << 6) | (c1 & 63)); i += 2; } else { c1 = StringToDecode.charCodeAt(i + 1); c2 = StringToDecode.charCodeAt(i + 2); EncodedText += String.fromCharCode(((c & 15) << 12) | ((c1 & 63) << 6) | (c2 & 63)); i += 3; } } return EncodedText; } private static _Encode(StringToEncode: string, Base64EncodeNode: string): string { let output: string = ""; var chr1, chr2, chr3, enc1, enc2, enc3, enc4; var i = 0; StringToEncode = CB.Utf8Encode(StringToEncode) while (i < StringToEncode.length) { chr1 = StringToEncode.charCodeAt(i++); chr2 = StringToEncode.charCodeAt(i++); chr3 = StringToEncode.charCodeAt(i++); enc1 = chr1 >> 2; enc2 = ((chr1 & 3) << 4) | (chr2 >> 4); enc3 = ((chr2 & 15) << 2) | (chr3 >> 6); enc4 = chr3 & 63; if (isNaN(chr2)) { enc3 = enc4 = 64; } else if (isNaN(chr3)) { enc4 = 64; } output = output + Base64EncodeNode.charAt(enc1) + Base64EncodeNode.charAt(enc2) + Base64EncodeNode.charAt(enc3) + Base64EncodeNode.charAt(enc4); } return output; } private static _Decode(StringToDecode: string, Base64EncodeNode: string): string { let output: string = ""; var chr1, chr2, chr3, enc1, enc2, enc3, enc4; var i = 0; while (i < StringToDecode.length) { enc1 = Base64EncodeNode.indexOf(StringToDecode.charAt(i++)); enc2 = Base64EncodeNode.indexOf(StringToDecode.charAt(i++)); enc3 = Base64EncodeNode.indexOf(StringToDecode.charAt(i++)); enc4 = Base64EncodeNode.indexOf(StringToDecode.charAt(i++)); chr1 = (enc1 << 2) | (enc2 >> 4); chr2 = ((enc2 & 15) << 4) | (enc3 >> 2); chr3 = ((enc3 & 3) << 6) | enc4; output = output + String.fromCharCode(chr1); if (enc3 != 64) { output = output + String.fromCharCode(chr2); } if (enc4 != 64) { output = output + String.fromCharCode(chr3); } } return StringToDecode = CB.Utf8Decode(output); } public static Encode(String: string, PassWord: number): string { var Base64EncodeNode: string = ""; for (var i: number = 0; i < GetUpperCaseTable().length; i++) { Base64EncodeNode += CB.Shift(GetUpperCaseTable()[i], PassWord); } for (var i: number = 0; i < GetLowerCaseTable().length; i++) { Base64EncodeNode += CB.Shift(GetLowerCaseTable()[i], PassWord); } Base64EncodeNode += GetNumberTable() + GetSpicialTable(); return CB._Encode(String, Base64EncodeNode); } public static Decode(String: string, PassWord: number): string { var Base64EncodeNode: string = ""; for (var i: number = 0; i < GetUpperCaseTable().length; i++) { Base64EncodeNode += CB.Shift(GetUpperCaseTable()[i], PassWord); } for (var i: number = 0; i < GetLowerCaseTable().length; i++) { Base64EncodeNode += CB.Shift(GetLowerCaseTable()[i], PassWord); } Base64EncodeNode += GetNumberTable() + GetSpicialTable(); return CB._Decode(String, Base64EncodeNode); }}class InterpreterManager { static LoadScript(VMScript: string) { let InterpreterStringList = VMScript.split(";"); for (let EachInterpreter of InterpreterStringList) { InterpreterManager.RegisterInterpreter(new InterpreterMaker(EachInterpreter)); } } static RegisterInterpreters(InnerInterpreterList: Array<Interpreter>) { for (let Interpreter of InnerInterpreterList) { InterpreterManager.RegisterInterpreter(Interpreter); } } static RegisterInterpreter(Interpreter: Interpreter) { if (Interpreter.InterpreterPassword != 0) { let TrueInterpreterCode = CB.Decode(Interpreter.InterpreterCode, Interpreter.InterpreterPassword); let TrueInterpreterIdentification = CB.Decode(Interpreter.InterpreterIdentification, Interpreter.InterpreterPassword); ScriptRuntime.RegisterRuntimeFunction(TrueInterpreterIdentification, TrueInterpreterCode); } else { ScriptRuntime.RegisterRuntimeFunction(Interpreter.InterpreterIdentification, Interpreter.InterpreterCode); } } static CallInterpreter(InterpreterName: string, Pars : string): string { return ScriptRuntime.CallInnerFunction(InterpreterName, Pars) }}/*function CreateScript() { let RawInterpreters = [ " a(r)#{return D(~r,1)}", " D(r,n)#{return n?D(r^n,(r&n)<<1):r}", " E(r,n)#{return D(r,a(n))}", " F(r,n)#{var a=0;while(n){if(n&1){a=D(a,r)}r=r<<1;n=n>>1}return a}", " G(r,n)#{var a=0;while(r>=n){r=E(r,n);a=D(a,1)}return a}", " H(r)#{return r.length}", " J(r,n)#{return!(r^n)}", " K(r,n)#{return r[n]}", " L(r)#{if(r.length==1){return r.charCodeAt(0)}}", " M(r)#{return+r}", " N(r)#{return String(r)}", " O(r,n)#{return r+n}", " Q(r,n,a,v)#{for(var t=r;t<=n;t++){if(a[t]!=v[t-r]){return false}}return true}", " r(r)#{var n=r;var a=H(n);var v=J(a,24);var t=K(n,0);var u=K(n,1);var i=K(n,2);var e=K(n,3);var f=D(L(t),L(i));var o=E(L(t),L(u));var c=K(n,6);var l=K(n,7);var h=K(n,16);var w=K(n,17);var I=J(E(L(u),L(h)),0);var S=J(D(L(c),L(l)),D(L(h),L(w)));var _=J(E(L(u),L(c)),0);var g=K(n,21);var p=K(n,22);var s=J(E(F(L(g),2),G(66,L(p))),64);var P=Q(9,15,n,\"Pt_In_S\");var T=J(L(l),L(\"r\"));var b=J(f,231);var d=J(o,16);var j=M(K(n,5));var k=J(G(M(O(N(L(e)),\"0\")),j),204);var m=M(K(n,8));var q=Q(18,20,n,\"IpT\");var x=J(E(j,m),4);var y=J(F(m,m),m);var z=J(D(L(K(n,4)),D(m,m)),L(K(n,23)));var A=J(L(u),99);var B=J(L(K(n,23)),125);var C=J(L(K(n,22)),33);return v&&I&&S&&_&&s&&P&&T&&b&&d&&k&&q&&x&&y&&z&&A&&B&&C}" ]; let Result: string = ""; for (let RawInterpreter of RawInterpreters) { let SplitedRawInterpreter = RawInterpreter.split("#"); let RandomPassword = Math.floor(Math.random() * (255 + 255 + 1) - 255); Result += CB.Encode(SplitedRawInterpreter[1], RandomPassword) + "|" + RandomPassword + "|" + CB.Encode(SplitedRawInterpreter[0], RandomPassword) + ";"; } return Result;}*/InterpreterManager.LoadScript("z3EgyCQtwdWZFC5tGYZkaL==|-187|DBZjxdf=;a3FhzDRuxeXqL0Mkyh5qHYduFi4lLZstGPlubM==|204|EAMkyetqGM==;g3LnfJXadkDGMJKuAUjwMUn9|-24|KGWqekzwMS==;h3CkflEkSWD7g2kseJXrelo7dZBrelBaNAwkSXTrBVabNA1bSAL8SGH7em1xSm4aiAMogKYbelEkiT==|-205|LHBrflaxNT==;v3QytzSyGKR7u2ygsXLfta49szc7ta1WBYZjszb7PK1VBXVjDJc9tdM0uOAlZXW9|-139|ZVtftzolBH==;i3NphLZcfmFcPqbpfqh0eL0=|108|MIksgmo=;c3HjbFTwzgCmaj5sIV0=|128|GCmmagvsIO==;p3UwoSGjmtMjH25oqB==|219|TPdzntifVB==;u2bcAXYkrWLkP3HeFJ0nANjoPNH1sc4wsy5zqWVoG29aPKV0ATQfvN0=|198|YUmesya=;p3UwoSGjmtejqB==|-145|TP0zntv=;t3YasWKnqxQIsWYeqbrdrxa9|119|XT4drxz=;l3QskOCfipIfR259|-175|PL8vjpebRX==;j2Eahnm2DCNliI1dT3V8UB47iHxwPCyuEnmmB3WiNY12B3Vyhq0uj3OqiMAdgnGrDBceEC19hrA0iCOzNMWdiBA9|-229|NKJthnczQLJxinp=;|-8|AZAguac=");//document.body.innerHTML = InterpreterManager.CallInterpreter("r","sctf{5cr1Pt_In_ScrIpT!!}");
posts.content:
没啥值得提的,看一下源码大家就都明白了[逃]

第一层很简单, eval->console.log即可dump出前部源码

第二层其实是四则运算的位运算版,可以直接脚本爆破,也可以下个断点直接判断出每个函数的功能

P.S.:没有TS的日子无法想象啊~

posts.title: CSharp中实现一个可继承的Singleton基类
posts.text: 网上大部分的单例实现都要求在类里添加一个”GetInstance()”并且声明私有的构造函数,额外多了几行没啥用且重复的代码,一不小心还会忘记把构造函数搞成私有的,非常不爽,所以就搞了个这东西 不多说,上代码,使用的时候只需要public class ClassName : Singleton<ClassName>即可,获取实例直接ClassName.Instance,无需额外的更改 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849using System;using System.Collections.Generic;namespace InstanceHelper.Singleton { public class Singleton<T> { private static Dictionary<Type, Object> TypeObjectMap = new Dictionary<Type, Object>(); private static List<Type> TypeLoadList = new List<Type>(); static public T Instance { get => GetInstance(typeof(T)); } public Singleton() { lock (TypeLoadList) { if (!TypeLoadList.Contains(this.GetType())) { throw new NewSingletonClassException(String.Format("Class {0} is Singleton, Use \"{1}.Instance;\" but \"new {1}();\"", this.GetType().FullName, this.GetType().Name)); } } } private static void LockUnregisterTypeLoadStatus(Type _Type) { lock (TypeLoadList) { if (TypeLoadList.Contains(_Type)) { TypeLoadList.Remove(_Type); } } } private static void LockRegisterTypeLoadStatus(Type _Type) { lock (TypeLoadList) { if (!TypeLoadList.Contains(_Type)) { TypeLoadList.Add(_Type); } } } protected static T GetInstance(Type _Type) { if (!TypeObjectMap.ContainsKey(_Type)) { lock (TypeObjectMap) { if (!TypeObjectMap.ContainsKey(_Type)) { LockRegisterTypeLoadStatus(_Type); var Instance = Activator.CreateInstance(_Type); LockUnregisterTypeLoadStatus(_Type); TypeObjectMap.Add(_Type, Instance); } } } return (T)TypeObjectMap[_Type]; } }}
posts.content:
网上大部分的单例实现都要求在类里添加一个”GetInstance()”并且声明私有的构造函数,额外多了几行没啥用且重复的代码,一不小心还会忘记把构造函数搞成私有的,非常不爽,所以就搞了个这东西

不多说,上代码,使用的时候只需要public class ClassName : Singleton<ClassName>即可,获取实例直接ClassName.Instance,无需额外的更改
posts.slug: CSharp中实现一个可继承的Singleton基类

posts.title: SCTF 2018 WTFGame出题思路及解析
posts.text: 0x01 考点与解析其实这道题的原意是考察对JVM的了解 由于我们存在一个类的基地址泄露,加上Boss Know Everything的提示,最简单的思路应当是替换VIPPlayer与Boss的类,使VIPPlayer.toString()->Boss.toString(),即可获得FLAG 我们知道,Java的内存区域分为PC寄存器(Program Counter Register)、Java虚拟机栈(Java Virtual Machine Stacks)、本地方法栈(Native Method Stack)、Java堆(Java Heap)和方法区(Method Area). 我们知道,在C++层面,每一个Java Class都是一个instanceOop的实例,所以我们可以看看src/share/vm/oops/instanceOop.hpp[在线版戳这里],得到如下代码 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728#ifndef SHARE_VM_OOPS_INSTANCEOOP_HPP#define SHARE_VM_OOPS_INSTANCEOOP_HPP#include "oops/oop.hpp"class instanceOopDesc : public oopDesc { public: // aligned header size. static int header_size() { return sizeof(instanceOopDesc)/HeapWordSize; } // If compressed, the offset of the fields of the instance may not be aligned. static int base_offset_in_bytes() { // offset computation code breaks if UseCompressedClassPointers // only is true return (UseCompressedOops && UseCompressedClassPointers) ? klass_gap_offset_in_bytes() : sizeof(instanceOopDesc); } static bool contains_field_offset(int offset, int nonstatic_field_size) { int base_in_bytes = base_offset_in_bytes(); return (offset >= base_in_bytes && (offset-base_in_bytes) < nonstatic_field_size * heapOopSize); }};#endif // SHARE_VM_OOPS_INSTANCEOOP_HPP 发现它继承自oopDesc[在线版戳这里] 12345678910class oopDesc { friend class VMStructs; private: volatile markOop _mark; union _metadata { Klass* _klass; narrowKlass _compressed_klass; } _metadata; //省略一万行代码} 所以,当我们new一个对象时,Jvm会帮我们在Java Heap中分配一块内存,结构为 1234567891011121314151617+-------------------------+| +---------------------+ || | instanceOopDesc | || | +-----------------+ | || | | markOop _mark | | || | +-----------------+ | || | +-----------------+ | || | | union _metadata | | || | +-----------------+ | || +---------------------+ || +---------------------+ || | instanceData | || +---------------------+ || +---------------------+ || | Pedding | || |---------------------| |+-------------------------+ 题目描述所给的是Java 7 x86的环境,所以不存在指针压缩的问题,即此处_metadata为Klass* _klass,另外,Java堆区的内存默认属性为rw,所以我们只需要互换Boss与VIPPlayer的InstanceAddress+4的值就行 P.S.:为啥会有VIPPlayer呢?我就想听你们夸我帅,哪怕不是真心的 0x02 题目解析这个程序主要的东西都在1public String PraseCommand(String Command) 中,其中我们需要注意的是ShowInfo,Save,SetATK(SetHP),DebugSetDataStoreAddress 其中,Save暴露了两个类的基地址 DebugSetDataStoreAddress+ShowInfo可造成任意地址读 DebugSetDataStoreAddress+SetATK(SetHP)可造成任意地址写 所以此处就不额外放Exp了 另外,最关键的就是VeroFessIsHandsome(手动滑稽) 另外GetShell也是可选的高难度通关方法,但是有队师傅直接rm -rf /*了,至今不知道是谁… 前排推荐Nu1L大佬们的高难度通关姿势
posts.content:
0x01 考点与解析

其实这道题的原意是考察对JVM的了解

由于我们存在一个类的基地址泄露,加上Boss Know Everything的提示,最简单的思路应当是替换VIPPlayer与Boss的类,使VIPPlayer.toString()->Boss.toString(),即可获得FLAG

我们知道,Java的内存区域分为PC寄存器(Program Counter Register)、Java虚拟机栈(Java Virtual Machine Stacks)、本地方法栈(Native Method Stack)、Java堆(Java Heap)和方法区(Method Area).

我们知道,在C++层面,每一个Java Class都是一个instanceOop的实例,所以我们可以看看src/share/vm/oops/instanceOop.hpp[在线版戳这里],得到如下代码

发现它继承自oopDesc[在线版戳这里]

所以,当我们new一个对象时,Jvm会帮我们在Java Heap中分配一块内存,结构为

题目描述所给的是Java 7 x86的环境,所以不存在指针压缩的问题,即此处_metadata为Klass* _klass,另外,Java堆区的内存默认属性为rw,所以我们只需要互换Boss与VIPPlayer的InstanceAddress+4的值就行

0x02 题目解析

这个程序主要的东西都在

中,其中我们需要注意的是ShowInfo,Save,SetATK(SetHP),DebugSetDataStoreAddress

其中,Save暴露了两个类的基地址

DebugSetDataStoreAddress+ShowInfo可造成任意地址读

DebugSetDataStoreAddress+SetATK(SetHP)可造成任意地址写

所以此处就不额外放Exp了
